Keyword and pattern scan over decoded JWT content and raw text.
This tool performs local, read-only inspection. It does not verify JWT
signatures, prove that opaque fields (xr2, UUIDs) cannot be correlated by
Broadcom, or certify legal adequacy of upload. A clean verdict means no
obvious sensitive patterns were found in decoded content—not zero residual
